3303350.name: Don't Panik
3303350.description: Don't Panic is a 2.5D pixel and voxel art puzzle platformer that takes players into a world of challenges and surprises. In this vertical slice, players face the fear of heights through two unique levels, combining intricate puzzles and platforming mechanics that test skills and resilience. Navigate vibrant landscapes filled with clever obstacles and enemies, all set in a retro-inspired visual style. This preview offers a glimpse of the platforming, exploration, and emotional themes at the heart of Don't Panic, where managing panic levels is as crucial as solving each puzzle and landing each jump.
3303350.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
